name: w163_sm9_battery_anchor
guidance: Use middle categories for mixed or context-dependent views of social media. Reserve very strong answers for support types whose own outlook clearly matches the item wording.

social_media_optimism: sees social media as mostly harmful
sees social media as mostly helpful
voice_and_accountability: skeptical that online voice creates real accountability
believes social media sometimes amplifies underrepresented voices
strongly believes social media empowers people and accountability
distraction_cynicism: low concern about distraction and performative activism
moderate concern about distraction and performative activism
high concern about distraction and performative activism
news_attention: rarely learns important issues through social media
sometimes learns important issues through social media
often learns important issues through social media
response_style: reserves very well for statements that clearly describe social media
uses somewhat well for mixed or context-dependent statements
answers more strongly when a statement matches personal experience
